fortunes: A bug you fear will fix itself. A bug you ignore will multiply.
Today, the code compiles on the first try. Treasure this.
A stranger will approve your PR without comment. Pure bliss.
Beware: someone is about to say 'it works on my machine.'
Your future holds a green checkmark and a quiet sense of peace.
Fortune favors you, but only after you clear your cache.
A merge conflict approaches. Stay calm and pick incoming.
Good news arrives in the form of a passing test you forgot you wrote.
Today is a good day to delete code. Less is more.
Someone will thank you for documentation you didn't write. Accept it.
An old TODO will resurface. It still loves you.
Your luck is rising, but so is your tab count. Balance is key.
A nap now will solve the problem you've stared at for hours.
The deploy will succeed. The celebration will be premature.
You will find the missing semicolon. It was you all along.
Avoid pushing on Fridays. The spirits of on-call are watching.
A great idea will come to you in the shower. Write it on the mirror.
Today's lucky number is 200. Today's unlucky number is 500.
Fortune smiles upon you, then immediately opens a new ticket.
Trust the process. The process does not trust you back, but trust it anyway.
